CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF SEARS, ROEBUCK & CO. HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ECHO WEST, INC., A CALIF CORP. POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $2,500.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $21,893.94 DAMAGES, $2,195.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $117.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,205.94, $3,724.97 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $ 27930.91 SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH
